LSE-HS10-L4-13001400-HSSCIENG910-TTM-API-02 • HS Science Engineering Design 9-10 • Engineering Design — Constraint Tradeoffs

The Time Pod Tradeoff

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to decide?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Build a full justification: make a claim about what the girl is trying to decide, explain the reasoning she gives in the dialogue, and state the conclusion about which two options she is choosing between.
